case_title: MEN YEE LAU VS. JACQUELINE MICHELLE GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, MEN YEE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JACQUELINE MICHELLE GARCIA, FELIPE DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-18-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-03-2013
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MEN YEE LAU FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-28-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-18-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-18-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-28-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, MEN YEE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-08-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-08-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
